name: Ciao Bella
subtitle: What's Good Right Now
description: Ray's neighbor Mrs. Deluca made something like this every summer. Never gave out the recipe. Ray watched through the fence long enough to figure it out. Fresh mozz, tomato, basil, a balsamic glaze that made the whole thing sing, sourdough. Mrs. Deluca would probably be mad. Ray thinks she'd be a little proud too.
